_meta.purpose: Seed defaults for ensure_default_rules() in app/models/rules.py. These are the system-essential rules (sleep/wake) that every world needs. ensure_default_rules() compares this list against shared/rules/rules.json by id and appends missing entries. Worlds that override or disable a rule keep their override (DB layer).

rules.name: Waking up
rules.condition: stamina>60 AND is_sleeping AND NOT schedule:sleeping
